attributes.ai.response.text: The 40 paragraphs are identical, each explaining that prompt caching enables xAI to reuse large system prompts and long few-shot examples across requests for efficiency. No prompt caching was applied in this specific processing, as the input was treated as a single, non-reusable instance.
